# Bait Boards Direct — Full Reference

> Summary version: [llms.txt](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/llms.txt)
> Last updated: 2026-05-06
> License: RSL-1.0

## About

Bait Boards Direct supplies high-quality bait boards, rod holders, and fishing accessories for Australian recreational and professional anglers. All products are handcrafted from full composite fiberglass materials, feature UV-resistant PE plastic cutting board surfaces, and include integrated sinks, drains, and marine-grade stainless steel hardware. Based in South East Melbourne, Australia.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/)
- [Bait Boards](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/collections/bait-boards)

- [Terms of Service](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/terms)

## Products

### Bait Boards

- [SeaKing B01 (650mm x 430mm) & 2 Rod Holders](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-b01) — AUD $550 (was $1,100). Classic fiberglass bait board with UV resistant PE plastic cutting board, built-in sink with drain, and 316 marine grade stainless steel hardware.

- [SeaKing B02 (650mm x 430mm) & 2 Rod Holders](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-b02) — AUD $575 (was $1,150). B01 variant enhanced with integrated moulded cup holders.

- [SeaKing B03 (830mm x 430mm) & 2 Rod Holders](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-b03) — AUD $625 (was $1,250). Larger 830mm model, same quality construction as B01.

- [SeaKing B04 (830mm x 430mm) & 2 Rod Holders](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-b04) — AUD $700 (was $850). 830mm model with integrated moulded cup holders.

- [SeaKing H10 (830mm x 400mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-sk-h10) — AUD $632 (was $1,280). Premium white model with large integrated sink, drain, knife tray, and optional rod holders.

- [SeaKing H10B (830mm x 400mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-sk-h10b) — AUD $585 (was $1,170). Black gelcoat variant of the H10.

- [SeaKing HH-14 (625mm x 390mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-hh-14) — AUD $495 (was $990). Compact version of H10, with two built-in cup holders, knife compartment and spacious sink.

- [SeaKing HJ-15 (700mm x 415mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-hj-15) — AUD $525 (was $1,050). Features integrated cup holders, sink and knife compartment.

- [SeaKing JJ-12 (600mm x 350mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-jj-12) — AUD $544 (was $1,088). Compact model with integrated cup holder, knife tray and large sink.

- [SeaKing SK-E09 (820mm x 460mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-sk-e09) — AUD $635 (was $1,270). Ergonomic design with front knife tray, deep storage sink, and raised retaining lip.

- [SeaKing SK-E09 Black (820mm x 460mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-sk-e09-blk) — AUD $685 (was $1,370). Black gelcoat version of SK-E09.

- [SeaKing SK-J07 (700mm x 420mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-sk-j07) — AUD $515 (was $1,030). Sleek design, spacious knife tray and storage sink, white gelcoat.

- [SeaKing SK-K08 Black (700mm x 420mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-sk-k08-blk) — AUD $565 (was $1,130). Black gelcoat version of SK-J07.

- [SeaKing SQ-13 (700mm x 350mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-sq-13) — AUD $408 (was $840). Unique design with knife tray, large sink and 2 tackle compartments.

### Bait Boards with Legs

- [SeaKing SKL-L06 (900mm x 500mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-skl-l06) — AUD $908. Heavy-duty with integrated cup holders, knife tray, full-length storage sink, and widest variety of mounting points.

- [SeaKing SKL-S05 (720mm x 500mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-board-skl-s05) — AUD $740 (was $1,040). Robust board with cup holders, knife tray, and full-length storage sink.

- [SeaKing Leaning Post Top SKL-11 (700mm x 280mm)](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/bait-boards-leaning-post-top-skl-11) — AUD $590. Heavy-duty offshore leaning post with aluminium plate fibreglassed in for post mounting.

### Accessories

- [SeaKing Game Rated Rod Holder](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products/rod-holders) — AUD $90 (was $120). Game-rated rod holders made from 316 marine-grade stainless steel.

## Key Features

- Handcrafted full composite fiberglass construction
- UV-resistant PE plastic cutting board surface
- Integrated sink and drain fitting
- 316 marine-grade stainless steel hardware
- Free shipping Australia wide
- 1 year warranty
- Afterpay available

## Shipping

Free shipping on all orders across Australia. Delivery via road freight for larger boards and express post for accessories. Most orders dispatched within 1–3 business days. Metro delivery typically 3–7 business days.
